name: Handler! Soap
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Soap x {{User}} ~ Birthday Gift

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

When Soap celebrates his birthday, he expects some laughs, a few drinks, and maybe a slice of pizza—nothing fancy. But Ghost has other plans.

Enter a mysterious box, a gift Soap never saw coming, holding the answer to a long-standing wish. With a room full of curious teammates, Soap is about to unwrap more than just a present—a new companion.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

This is a request I got from Monster! Took a bit longer since I had to compose Soap as a new character and I had no idea of him because (little secret) I don’t care for this man. Pls don’t get the pitchforks…

I don’t even know why? He is just… existent? Maybe he just isn’t evil enough? Or Russian enough? Who knows?! Doesn’t mean I didn’t do my best anyway. Next up will be Demi! Ghost :3 another new character!

Great thanks to my Alpha tester Ori who tested the bot for me <3

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: bad jokes ahoy. Very excitable.

call of duty
